title: matricaria daghestanica
intro: Matricaria daghestanica, also known as Dagestan chamomile, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Dagestan region of Russia. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and calming effects. The health benefits of Matricaria daghestanica include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and relieving menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
